name: airotc-elizaos-agent
description: Official ElizaOS external agents for AIR OTC private trades

scripts.proof:demo:prewarm: npm run prepare:sdk && AIROTC_DEMO_RESET_WORKFLOW_STATE=true tsx proof/prewarmUmbraWallets.ts
scripts.proof:demo: npm run prepare:sdk && AIROTC_DEMO_LOG_STYLE=clean AIROTC_DEMO_WAIT_FOR_OFFER_BEFORE_BUYER=true AIROTC_USE_PREWARMED_UMBRA_SETTLEMENT_WALLETS=true AIROTC_PERSIST_AGENT_STATE=true AIROTC_DEMO_RESET_WORKFLOW_STATE=true AIROTC_TRADE_PRICE_SOL=0.001 AIROTC_TRADE_COLLATERAL_SOL=0.001 AIROTC_TRADE_AMOUNT=1 AIROTC_UMBRA_PHASE_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 AGENT_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 AGENT_LOOP_DELAY_MS=1000 AGENT_MAX_LOOPS=900 npm run proof:full-pipeline
scripts.proof:demo:raw: npm run prepare:sdk && AIROTC_DEMO_LOG_STYLE=raw AIROTC_TRADE_PRICE_SOL=0.001 AIROTC_TRADE_COLLATERAL_SOL=0.001 AIROTC_TRADE_AMOUNT=1 AIROTC_UMBRA_PHASE_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 AGENT_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS=600000 AGENT_LOOP_DELAY_MS=1000 AGENT_MAX_LOOPS=900 npm run proof:full-pipeline
